title: How Most Things Work
original_title: Cómo funcionan casi todas las cosas
overview: Celina works at a remote tollbooth on a desert road, few days before Christmas, her father dies and Celina becomes a door-to-door encyclopedia saleswoman so she can earn enough money to travel to Italy and find her mom.
